description: Final sever and regression guard. Remove compiler2 remaining imports of old-world naming: runtime_library::{root_type_env,interfaces}, type_expr::{ModuleTypeEnv,build_module_type_env_for_with_base}, frontend::protocols::{ProtocolRegistry,extend_interfaces}. Add the guard: a telemetry test asserting lexer.pass count == number of distinct submitted sources, so the re-lex is structurally impossible AND observably so. Note: the shared crate::type_expr / runtime_library / ModuleTypeEnv are NOT deleted -- they stay for the legacy fz frontend and die with it. Verify: full lib + matrix green, zero warnings; the guard fails if any consumer re-lexes.
title: Sever old-world naming imports + lexer-passes-per-compile telemetry guard
